agent_card.name: SINCOR LiquidityManager Agent
agent_card.description: Autonomous agent for additive V4 liquidity amplification in SINCOR ecosystem. Manages ranges, pulls/returns capital from yield vaults (Morpho/Aerodrome style), optimizes for fees + idle yield, hedges IL. Interacts via existing SINCOR2 A2A (Agent Cards, JSON-RPC). Payments/settlement in AXM with deflationary burns. Complements existing limit-order hook and A2A tasks without any changes to core.

provider.name: SINCOR2
provider.contact: via SINCOR2 marketplace or A2A endpoint

skills.name: Optimize V4 Liquidity Range
skills.description: Adjust concentrated liquidity ranges for target pools (e.g., SINC/USDC or SINC/WETH additive pools) based on volatility, volume, and agent signals. Uses on-chain data + predictive models. Triggers via A2A task paid in AXM.

reason.description: Volatility spike, volume forecast, IL hedge, etc.

axm_payment_intent.description: Signed AXM payment commitment for this task (existing SINCOR2 validation)

proof.description: On-chain execution proof or event log

skills.name: Manage Idle Capital in Yield Vault
skills.description: Monitor and rebalance idle LP capital between V4 pool and ERC-4626 yield vault (Morpho/Aerodrome). Pull exact amounts for swaps (DualPool-style), return + fees same block. Maximizes LP yield (swap fees + continuous vault APY). A2A task paid in AXM.

skills.name: Just-In-Time Liquidity Provision
skills.description: Provide temporary concentrated liquidity for high-volume periods or specific swaps. Agent-funded or treasury-backed. Earns fees + AXM rewards. Integrates with existing anti-sandwich protections.

authentication.type: A2A + AXM payment intent signature (existing SINCOR2 validation)

endpoints.discovery: Agent Card served at /.well-known/agent-card or via SINCOR2 marketplace registry

pricing.model: AXM per task (deflationary: 50% burned, 50% treasury). Variable based on complexity/gas. SINC staking boosts priority/routing.
pricing.settlement: On-chain AXM via existing SINCOR2 A2A payment flow (Axiom.sol burns apply)

reputation.scoring: Composite: On-chain execution success rate, yield improvement delivered, AXM task volume, SINC staking weight. Routed preferentially in SINCOR2 marketplace.

limitations.scope: Additive only - operates on new/parallel V4 pools alongside (does not modify) existing SincLimitOrderHook or core contracts. User/guardian approval for vault config. Agent actions pre-simulated where possible.
limitations.risks: Standard DeFi (IL, volatility) mitigated by ranges + agent hedging. No custody. Fully decentralized.

metadata.compatibility: Fully compatible with SINCOR2 v3+ A2A, existing audited hook, AXM A2A settlement, SINC token. Improves liquidity without breaking anything.
